step_rationale: PMN-derived oxidative enzyme driving LDL oxidation, plaque inflammation, and NET-mediated thrombosis.
mechanism: Myeloperoxidase oxidizes LDL and generates reactive oxygen species in atherosclerotic plaques, promoting inflammation and endothelial dysfunction; also a marker of neutrophil extracellular trap formation and thrombotic activation in acute MI.
